title: USDA Layer Structure Production Contract
format_neutral_rules: contracts/document-model-productions/layer-spec.contract.json — layer spec field set, primChildren maintenance, and storage rules are pinned in the format-neutral production. This contract covers the USDA-specific LayerHeader, LayerContent grammar, and reorder rootPrims keyword production.

included: statement separator and padding handling delegated to usda-lexical-format

storage_mapping.LayerHeader: validated by the parser and not stored in the document model
storage_mapping.LayerMetadata: stored on the root layer spec
storage_mapping.reorder rootPrims: stored as the root primOrder field
storage_mapping.PrimSpec: stored as child prim specs through usd-document-model

laws: a successful parse returns a target-native document-model Layer, not JSON
all created specs must be stored through usd-document-model
duplicate paths must halt processing with a diagnostic
format_neutral_laws_hoisted: multiple authored root-prim reorderings leave the last authored list in primOrder (document-model-productions/layer-spec.contract.json#laws)
active=false is preserved as field storage; the parser does not filter inactive prims from the layer (document-model-productions/prim-spec.contract.json#laws)
golden_groups: duplicate root and nested spec paths
